scripts.test:spatial: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/spatialReplay.test.ts tests/spatialMapper.test.ts tests/spatialEventContract.test.ts tests/heapApiContract.test.ts tests/capabilityGraphApiContract.test.ts tests/capabilityOverlayModel.test.ts tests/chatSocketContract.test.ts tests/shellNavigationModel.test.ts tests/requestScope.test.ts tests/brandPolicyApiContract.test.ts tests/brandLogoPolicy.test.ts
scripts.test:layout-playwright: PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSER=chrome npx playwright test -c playwright.heap.config.ts tests/playwright/layout-catalogue.spec.ts tests/playwright/layout-registry.spec.ts
scripts.test:layout-playwright:chrome: PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSER=chrome npx playwright test -c playwright.heap.config.ts tests/playwright/layout-catalogue.spec.ts tests/playwright/layout-registry.spec.ts
scripts.test:layout-playwright:webkit: PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSER=webkit npx playwright test -c playwright.heap.config.ts tests/playwright/layout-catalogue.spec.ts tests/playwright/layout-registry.spec.ts
